## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover behavior and regression risk.
- [ ] Public API XML docs and user documentation are updated.
- [ ] API/source/format compatibility was considered.
- [ ] Security and hostile-input behavior were considered.
- [ ] Samples and changelog are updated when user-visible.
- [ ] No private Anki data or absolute local paths are included.
- [ ] AI assistance is disclosed where material.
